surfaces.public_contract: Deterministic plan/start/execute/continue flow is evolving during pre-alpha.
surfaces.notes: Breaking changes acceptable while protocol converges.

surfaces.public_contract: Ariadne flow commands (start|iterate|execute|continue) are deterministic but still pre-beta.
surfaces.notes: Binary aliases gaia/ariadne remain compatibility entry points.

surfaces.public_contract: `ari query all --json` returns runtime, lifecycle, flow, and surfaces context envelope.
surfaces.notes: Treat envelope fields as additive until beta schema lock.

surfaces.public_contract: Seeded sandbox scenarios remain available for manual verification workflows.
surfaces.notes: Scenario internals may evolve without removing categories.

surfaces.public_contract: Legacy example surface maintained for temporary compatibility.
surfaces.notes: Illustrative deprecated entry for policy behavior.
